VAN NESS AVE, #299, STAYED UNTIL JAN-05-1995, LEASE FORFEITED, PLTF. SHALL HAVE JUDGMENT IN THE SUM OF $2315.00; WRIT MAY ISSUE BUT EVICTION UNTIL AFTER 1/5/95, 9AM; IF DEFTS. COMPLY WITH TERMS DEFT. MAY HAVE THE JUDGMENT DEEMED SATISFIED IN FULL; (SEE FILE FOR DETAILS).
